sub_tasks.desc: Coder Agent: Create Next.js web app skeleton and i18n infrastructure. Initialize Next.js app with `NextIntlProvider` for i18n, import global CSS, and embed a `<Layout>` component that enforces role‑based routing. Implement OWASP‑compliant meta tags via `<Head>` (Content‑Security‑Policy, X‑Frame‑Options) and sanitize any user‑provided locale query parameters. Override `Document.getInitialProps` to inject tenant‑aware `tenant_id` into HTML attributes for logging and security auditing. Configure `next-i18next` with resources for `en`, `vi`, etc., and implement locale detection middleware (user pref → browser → default) as per requirements. Apply input validation on locale strings to prevent injection. Detect request locale, set `x-tenant-id` header based on authenticated user’s tenant, and enforce CSP via `next-headers`.

Tester Agent: Write unit tests for i18n detection and middleware. Verify locale resolution logic matches the priority order (user pref → browser → default). Ensure tenant isolation by checking that `tenant_id` is correctly propagated in request headers. Test CSP header injection and locale header setting for various incoming request scenarios.

Docker Agent: Build Docker image for the web front‑end. Use Node‑20 Alpine base, install dependencies via `--prefer-offline`, run `next build`, and set production `NODE_ENV`. Include security best‑practice: non‑root user, minimal layers, and explicit `CVP` (Content Security Policy) headers in `nginx` config if used.

Coder Agent: Implement core layout and role‑based navigation. Render navigation links filtered by `user.role` (System Admin, Admin, Manager, Teacher, Student) per requirement matrix. Enforce OWASP A03 (Injection) by sanitizing all navigation parameters and A05 (Broken Access Control) via role checks. Include `<MetaTags>` component for page‑specific SEO.

Coder Agent: Develop AI CSKH chat widget component. Integrate with AI service endpoint, provide real‑time message handling, and enforce input sanitization to prevent XSS (OWASP A01). Implement responsive design and accessibility attributes.

Coder Agent: Create SSE service for dashboard real‑time updates. Establish EventSource connection to `/api/dashboard/stream`, handle reconnection logic, and parse JSON events. Apply tenant‑aware headers (`x-tenant-id`) for security. Generate `<title>` and meta description per locale using `next-seo` or equivalent. Ensure no duplicate meta tags and validate Open Graph tags for each language.

Reviewer Agent: Security review of front‑end components. Verify role‑based access control logic, confirm tenant isolation, and validate CSP header injection. Confirm input sanitization, output encoding, and rate‑limiting of AI requests to mitigate abuse.

Tester Agent: Unit tests for AI widget and SSE. Simulate user messages, verify response parsing, and ensure sanitized output. Mock EventSource, test reconnection flows, and confirm tenant header inclusion.

Coder Agent: Scaffold Capacitor mobile app with mirrored UI. Set up React Native / Next.js mobile entry, wrap with `RoleProvider`, and implement responsive layout for iOS/Android. Enforce OWASP A05 by validating deep‑link parameters used for navigation. Port web AI widget with mobile‑optimized styling, integrate with native push notification bridge. Register FCM token, handle incoming push notifications, and forward them to Zalo group messaging via backend API.

Docker Agent: Build Docker image for mobile front‑end. Use Node‑20 Alpine, install Capacitor CLI, build the mobile bundle, and include `capacitord` runtime for native plugins. Apply non‑root user and minimal layers for security.

GCP Agent: Generate Kubernetes manifests for front‑end services. Define Deployment with container image referencing the built web Docker image. Include environment variables: `TENANT_ID`, `NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK`, `SSE_ENDPOINT`, `AI_SERVICE_URL`. Apply resource limits, liveness/readiness probes, and securityContext (runAsNonRoot). Expose service on port 80, label with app=membership-hub-frontend, and attach appropriate Ingress rules for multi‑tenant routing.

Manager Agent: Execute final integration smoke test. Navigate through each role‑protected page, verify i18n locale switching, confirm AI widget renders, and assert SSE connection establishment. Validate push notification registration on mobile (if mobile test environment available). Capture any OWASP violations via automated security scanner integration.
